items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-441 dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution
id: c6782f1e-59b2-5c05-ae23-cefc6f217d25
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-441: dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-441: dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/16
modified: 2026/07/16
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-441: dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T01:49:55Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "ZDI-26-441: dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-441: dnsmasq DNS Response Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2399311; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Medium confidence — EPSS score 75.000 (very high exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Remote Code Execution - moderate severity (Risk 6.9/10). EPSS 0.75% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1190, T1059 (2 techniques). 33 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: MODERATE (43%) - partial intelligence corroboration.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-49279 - WWBN AVideo Stored XSS via autoEvalCodeOnHTML Bypass in Message
id: 96d6050c-87db-5c00-8bf5-474563545c19
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-49279 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: SQLI
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49279
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/16
modified: 2026/07/16
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-49279 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T01:49:55Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-49279", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-49279 Exploitation Attempt - SQLI"; flow:established,to_server; content:"UNION SELECT"; nocase; content:"--"; distance:0; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6354687; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: MONITOR — Assess in next vulnerability review cycle

title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-428 WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code E
id: a94010ee-7221-5ebb-9cc2-ad0b94e3e0d4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-428: WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-428: WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/16
modified: 2026/07/16
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-428: WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T01:49:55Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "ZDI-26-428: WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-428: WatchGuard FireWare OS admd Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2096958; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
